hooks.command: command -v atlas >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; atlas init --root "$root" --quiet
command -v atlas >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; if test -d "$root/.atlas"; then atlas build --root "$root" --changed-only; fi
